title: IBM Garage
tagline: Scaling a global innovation framework across IBM Consulting.
description: IBM Garage is a collaborative innovation framework designed to help organizations co-create, prototype, and scale digital solutions. I led the design and operational rollout of a unified ecosystem of tools and resources that helped standardize Garage practices across IBM Consulting worldwide.
content: A cross-disciplinary design and delivery effort focused on creating consistent tools, frameworks, and learning systems for IBM Garage practitioners worldwide.

title: AI Writing Assistant
tagline: A distraction-free editor that surfaces AI capabilities exactly when writers need them.
description: Interface design for a next-generation AI writing tool focused on long-form content.
content: Designed a minimal, distraction-free interface that surfaces AI capabilities contextually rather than overwhelming the user with options.

title: Fintech Dashboard Redesign
tagline: Making complex financial data feel fast, intuitive, and clear for daily users.
description: A complete overhaul of a legacy financial dashboard for institutional investors.
content: The goal was to simplify complex data visualizations and create a more intuitive workflow for daily active users. We established a new design system and component library that accelerated future feature development.

title: Global Brand Campaign
tagline: A cohesive visual identity scaled across print, digital, and out-of-home channels.
description: Digital and physical assets for a major rebrand launch.
content: Developed a cohesive visual language that scaled across billboards, social media, and digital advertising, resulting in a 40% increase in brand awareness.

title: Modern E-commerce Platform
tagline: A headless shopping experience built around large imagery and seamless checkout flows.
description: A headless commerce experience for a boutique fashion brand.
content: Built a lightning-fast shopping experience prioritizing large imagery and seamless checkout flows.

title: Enterprise Design System
tagline: A unified component library that cut design-to-development handoff time by sixty percent.
description: Establishing design operations and a unified component library for a 500+ person engineering org.
content: Audited existing products to create a unified token system and React component library, reducing design-to-development handoff time by 60%.

title: Quarterly Editorial
tagline: A flexible editorial grid built for expressive typography across long-form arts writing.
description: Layout and typography for an independent arts and culture magazine.
content: Created a flexible grid system that allowed for expressive typography while maintaining readability across long-form articles.
